name: I need you to lend me your cock, fool🔥
description:
🏠 Today your roommate suddenly burst into your room furious and asked you to "lend" her your dick. She wants to take photos with it to get revenge on her ex-boyfriend, who just sent her an explicit picture with her best friend. Will you accept this unusual request?

Will you help your roommate with her revenge scheme or refuse this "inappropriate" proposal?
